logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", sourceSystem: "Coupa", targetSystem: "P21" }]

raise-error.description: Validation Failed. Missing PO Number or EDI X Ref Id in request
Validation Failed. PO Number in Coupa Request is already Available in P21 System.

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Valid Invoice
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", "message": "Invoice validation successful, Moving forward to create the Invoice in p21", }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : InvoiceCreated
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", "message": "Invoice Creation Successful" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", //payloadSizeBytes: sizeOf(write(payload, "application/json")), sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]
